title: Add RAK2287/SX1302 multi-channel LoRa backend for lichen-gateway
description: Research and integrate Semtech SX1302/libloragw as new radio backend for border router to support true multi-channel reception. Map received LoRa payloads to LICHEN link layer frames (lichen-link). Support RAK2287 HAT on RPi. Break down into parallel sub-tasks for research, driver, integration, config, testing. See current lora-phy wrappers and sim patterns.
notes: Commit: db56b8778 - cleaned deployment doc for RAK2287 (removed AI artifacts/junk text and duplication)
close_reason: Fixed polluted deployment documentation for RAK2287/SX1302 backend; broke down epic into sub-tasks project-LICHEN-chw5/s3d6/r4sn; doc now clean and current
